email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Sales Support German speaker bij Michael Page International (Belgium). Uw omschrijving sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in klantgericht projectmanagement en mijn technische achtergrond in digitale marketing.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto werk ik dagelijks met klanten en leveranciers om projecten van A tot Z te beheren: van offerte tot oplevering. Ik ben gewend om meerdere projecten tegelijk te coördineren, orders op te volgen en problemen gestructureerd op te lossen. Mijn ervaring met Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel) en mijn gestructureerde aanpak maken mij een sterke kandidaat voor deze functie.

Ik spreek vloeiend Duits en Engels, en mijn Nederlands is op B1-niveau (ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren). Ik ben commercieel ingesteld, klantgericht en werk graag in een dynamisch team.

Ik voeg mijn cv en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop u snel te spreken.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales Support German speaker position at Michael Page International (Belgium). Your description aligns perfectly with my experience in customer-oriented project management and my technical background in digital marketing.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I work daily with customers and suppliers to manage projects from A to Z: from quotation to delivery. I am used to coordinating multiple projects simultaneously, following up on orders, and solving problems in a structured way. My experience with Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel) and my structured approach make me a strong candidate for this role.

I am fluent in German and English, and my Dutch is at B1 level (I am currently taking classes to improve further). I am commercially minded, customer-focused, and enjoy working in a dynamic team.

I attach my CV and cover letter. I hope to speak with you soon.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel interesse solliciteer ik naar de functie van Sales Support German speaker bij Michael Page International (Belgium). Uw omschrijving van een dynamische, duurzame werkomgeving waar groei en samenwerking centraal staan, spreekt mij zeer aan.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het beheren van projecten van begin tot eind. Ik werk nauw samen met klanten en leveranciers om ervoor te zorgen dat orders correct en op tijd worden afgehandeld. Ik los klachten professioneel op door de oorzaak te onderzoeken en in overleg met de accountmanager passende oplossingen te implementeren. Deze ervaring sluit direct aan bij de taken in uw vacature.

Daarnaast heb ik bij Katoen Natie in een snelle logistieke omgeving gewerkt, waar nauwkeurigheid en efficiëntie essentieel waren. Mijn technische achtergrond als front-end developer bij ViviDoctor heeft mij geleerd gestructureerd en probleemoplossend te werken.

Ik spreek vloeiend Duits en Engels, en mijn Nederlands is op B1-niveau (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren). Ik ben commercieel ingesteld, klantgericht en werk graag in teamverband. Mijn organisatievermogen stelt mij in staat om meerdere projecten tegelijk te beheren zonder het overzicht te verliezen.

Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor uw partnerbedrijf en bij te dragen aan een positieve teamcultuur. Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very interested in applying for the Sales Support German speaker position at Michael Page International (Belgium). Your description of a dynamic, sustainable work environment where growth and collaboration are key appeals to me greatly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for managing projects from start to finish. I work closely with customers and suppliers to ensure orders are handled correctly and on time. I handle complaints professionally by investigating the cause and implementing appropriate solutions in consultation with the account manager. This experience directly matches the tasks in your vacancy.

Additionally, I worked at Katoen Natie in a fast-paced logistics environment where accuracy and efficiency were essential. My technical background as a front-end developer at ViviDoctor taught me to work in a structured and problem-solving manner.

I am fluent in German and English, and my Dutch is at B1 level (I am taking lessons to improve). I am commercially minded, customer-focused, and enjoy working in a team. My organizational skills allow me to manage multiple projects simultaneously without losing oversight.

I am motivated to apply my skills for your partner company and contribute to a positive team culture. I hope to further explain my motivation in a personal conversation.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Fluent in German and English (native Turkish, Dutch B1)
Project management from quotation to delivery, including order processing and complaint handling
Strong customer focus and commercial mindset
Proficient in Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel)
Organized and detail-oriented, able to manage multiple priorities
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Languages: German (fluent), English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- Customer & project management: project coordination, order processing, complaint handling, supplier communication, commercial relationships
- Microsoft Office: Outlook, Word, Excel
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
